title: Move Health Network navigation bar down by 2 inches

requirements.text: Move the Health Network landing page navigation/header bar approximately 2 inches (roughly 192px) downward from its current position by adding top padding or margin to the Navigation component or its wrapper on the HealthNetworkLanding page.

quotes: please health network bar 2 inch down

acceptanceCriteria: The navigation bar on the Health Network landing page appears approximately 2 inches lower than its previous position
The navigation bar remains fully visible and functional after the positional change
No other pages are affected by this positional change

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
Do not alter the navigation bar's content, links, or interactive behavior
nonGoals: Changing navigation bar styling beyond vertical position
Modifying navigation on any page other than the Health Network landing page
